Да, у нее есть свои недостатки. Но у кого их нет? Это как ругаться на старую гитару с расстроенными струнами. Вроде и дребезжит, но сыграть легендарный риф всё равно можно. Игра прекрасна в своём хаосе. Её сообщество - это отдельный культ.

Отношение людей к игре напоминает мне анекдот про моряка:

Молодой моряк собирается в своё первое плавание. Приходит к капитану и просит совета, что с собой необходимо взять.

[u]Капитан говорит:[/u] 
[h3][i] - Ну, личные вещи, таблетки от тошноты и презервативы. [/i][/h3]
Побежал моряк в аптеку, купил 5 презервативов и 5 таблеток от тошноты.[h3][i] - Хватит?[/i][/h3] [u]Капитан говорит:[/u] 
[h3][i]  - Мы же надолго пойдем в море. Мало. [/i][/h3] 
Побежал еще раз и купил по 10 штук презервативов и таблеток.
[u]Капитан опять:[/u]
[h3][i] - Мало. [/i] [/h3]
Купил моряк по 100 презервативов и таблеток. 
[u]Тут аптекарь не выдержал и говорит:[/u] 
[h3][i] - Если тебя от нее тошнит, то зачем ты ее тр*хаешь?[/i][/h3]

[h1]CS2 WILL WASTE YOUR TIME[/h1]

[h2]THE LEGACY[/h2]
Counter Strike... The name itself evokes a particular feeling depending on who you are. If you've never touched the game and want to begin, the name won't end up living up to the legacy you've heard about.

1.6, source, csgo... These games are what made Counter Strike the sport it is today.

[b]Cs2 on the other hand is a state of a game![/b]

[h2]The Cheater Problem[/h2]
You WILL absolutely find a cheater almost every match. You have a greater chance they are on the enemy team as you occupy one of the 5 players on your side. So yes, the game will actually be rigged against you. Plenty of players cheat subtly, and a decent portion blatantly cheat without shame shooting you through smokes, aim botting, and wall hacking. These cheaters have been at it for years and no sign of any bans. Every so often you might hear of a purge, VAC bans hitting thousands of accounts at once, but don't be fooled. They will be back immediately.

It get's even worse! [b]Cheats are made to make people rich![/b]

The deathmatch servers are ridden with automated bot accounts playing with cheats to farm skins. The economy of the CS market has attracted leeches. If you engage with any trading system online a scammer will try to get in touch with you at least once a day. The greed that encompasses this game actually gives me a sickening feeling in my gut. It's disgusting.

[h2]Why Is The Game Still Popular?[/h2]
[i]Cs2 is hated by the majority but still popular[/i]

Despite the cheating problem many people still play the game... Why?

Either they're addicted to the skins, the gambling, or elo grinding. 

Or they simply fell in love with what counter strike is, but I assure you even they aren't happy with Cs2. It's sounds are off, the movement is sluggish and floaty in comparison to the beloved CSGO (giving the offensive a gigantic advantage), grenades throw late and far too slow, alias binds and optimisation has been removed from the game, the list goes on. No one likes the state of Cs2, not even the pros.

[h2]There Is No Placement For New Players[/h2]
The skill ceiling is so gigantically high and the matchmaking ranks are terribly designed that you'll have a terrible experience working for an accurate rank. With 1.2k hours in this game I am still considered the lowest rank, and I have spent at least a third of this time grinding out training and watching demos back. 

I have learned crosshair placement, counter strafing, angles, map timing, utility line ups, spray control patterns, spray transfers, tap shooting, burst shooting, crab walking, and plenty of strategies. Despite all I have learned I often bottom frag, losing duels to worse players who can run and shoot with a rifle worrying little about their spray and accuracy. 

I can't explain it but it actually feels like RNG about 50% of the time. If you have a bad game, it's not likely going to get better, you'll feel as if some players have a luck on their side whilst you have none.

[h2]Is My Complaints Valid?[/h2]
Maybe all of this sounds like a mental issue? Yes and no. You need to fight confidently for a good chance at winning, a bad mindset can literally lose you the entire game and downgrade the performance of your team mates. The reason why I partially say no is because I have walked into this game confident, with a healthy mindset and relentlessly kept it despite having such a rough time. But to no avail I can lose so hard even with confidence in my abilities, and consistently lose game after game.

You could sink thousands of hours into this game and get utterly nowhere, remain in the worse rank, have terrible stats and nothing to show for your work because this game favours spray and praying, and it also has a terrible ranking system meaning that decent players with over 3 thousand hours could be in your low rank. In fact it's common that even in the low elo ranks you'll die the millisecond your tiny head appears on the enemy screen, it doesn't matter how fast you're moving or if you learned to stop pressing "w" as you strafe.

Anyone who knows this game reading my review might see this is "skill issue" and they'd be right. I'm terrible at this game, bottom of the barrel. And it's not uncommon for people like me with 1k hours to be this bad, I'd say the majority of players with this amount of time are this bad. The game is so unbelievably hard. That would be fine if there was something worthwhile for the time and effort. But there isn't.

If you're on a losing streak you will absolutely feel like breaking something. The game recognises your losing streak and decides to take away 500 elo per loss and give back 100 per win due to this. It's designed to throw you so far back so quickly and destroy everything you've worked so hard for. It could have taken 500 hours to learn and improve to properly rank up, and in hours lose it all.

I've had weeks where every game all I got was a 4 v 5 team due to a leaver, a blatant enemy cheater, or a team mate who has never even touched a shooter before. And it's not uncommon to experience this.

[h2]In Summary[/h2]
I love counter strike, but I hate Cs2. I even hate Faceit as this seems to be only slightly better but far more toxic and mentally draining. I could sink in more hours to get better but my time and effort is better put elsewhere. At minimum you want about 2k hours before you could even learn the "basics" of this game and become a reliable player with consistent performance.

If you want to give this game a go, by all means go for it. But you will have many REAL LIFE days ruined literally due to a video game. If you're naturally gifted mechanically at shooters on the mouse and keyboard, maybe you'll have a better experience, I have friends that have had a much better and smoother experience due to their gifts, and have swiftly put in 8k hours (I am not saying they haven't had to struggle to get where they have got to, but their gifts have undoubtedly persuaded them to continue playing after 1k hours). I on the other hand personally can't bare another 1 thousand hours to just be called "average", or worse yet still be considered "bad" by the majority of players.

If you like competitive games but can't handle the mental strain of terrible ranking systems, unfortunately I think you're out of luck, no game seems to have it. CS2 being one of the worst I've seen.

If you came to read negative reviews because you're mad. Hi, turn from competitive games, it only hurts your pride, seek Jesus instead, He will give more than this game will ever have to offer. Love to all. If you do decide to play this game, good luck and I truly hope you have a better experience than me.

[h2] 現在のCS2はBOTだらけです [/h2]

【3行まとめ】
・現在、DM（デスマッチ）は業者のFarmBOTが非常に多いです。
・最新アプデでXP効率は落ちましたが、依然としてBOTの温床です。
・対人戦を楽しみたい方には、現状の公式DMはおすすめできません。

ここで言うBOTとは、公式BOTではなく、業者が利益目的で運用している「FarmBOT」のことです。
このレビューは、そんなBOT問題について書いたものなので、純粋にゲーム内容を知りたい方は他のレビューを参考にしてください。

[h3] そもそもなぜBOTがいるのか [/h3]
まず前提として、CS2には「Weekly Drop」というシステムがあります。
毎週水曜日の日本時間午前11時にリセットされ、ケースや武器スキンなどのアイテムを獲得できます。

これらのアイテムはSteam Marketで売却できるため、不要なアイテムでも現金化できるのが大きな特徴です。

Weekly Dropを受け取るには、ゲーム内でXPを5000獲得する必要があります。そのため業者は、大量のBOTアカウントを使ってXPを稼いでいるのが現状です。

[h3] なぜDeathMatch（DM）に集中するのか [/h3]
特に被害が深刻なのが「DeathMatch（以下DM）」です。
業者がDMを利用する理由はいくつかあります。

[list]
[*] XP効率が非常に高い
基本的にDMはXP効率が高く、他モードより短時間で稼ぎやすいです。
※2026年5月のアップデートでDMのXP効率には下方修正が入りました。以前はキル数に応じてXPを大量に獲得できましたが、現在は1マッチあたりXP75が上限になっています。そのため、現在はCompetitiveの方が効率的になっていると思われます。

[*] 通報されにくい
DMは5vs5ではなく全員敵のため、特定プレイヤーに執着されにくいモードです。結果としてBOTがヘイトを集めにくく、通報数も減りやすくなっています。

[*] マッチ時間が短い
DMは最大10分で終了します。不自然な挙動をしていても、通報される前に試合が終わるケースが多く、業者にとって都合の良い環境になっています。
[/list]

[h2] BOTの特徴 [/h2]
すべてのBOTに当てはまるわけではありませんが、多くのBOTには以下の特徴があります。

[list]
[*] スキンを使っていない
もちろんスキンを使わないプレイヤーもいますが、多くの人は何らかのスキンを装備しています。一方でBOTは、ほぼ例外なく初期スキンのままです。

[*] 決まったルートを巡回するだけ
BOTは待ち伏せをほとんど行わず、決められたルートを機械的に移動します。後ろから近づいても足音に反応しないことが多いです。

[*] 無敵時間中のプレイヤーを認識できない
リスポーン後の最大10秒間の無敵状態を、BOTはまるで存在していないかのようにスルーします。ひどい場合は、無敵状態のプレイヤーに進路を塞がれて立ち往生することすらあります。

[*] 目の前の敵しか認識していない
BOTを撃ってすぐ遮蔽物に隠れると、BOTは敵を見失ったかのように走り去ることがあります。「遮蔽物の裏にいる」という予測ができないため、InfernoのNew Box付近などは簡単に連続キルできてしまいます。

[*] 観戦モードに入ると挙動が変わる
これが最も分かりやすい判別方法です。DMでチーム選択時に観戦モードへ入ると、BOTは高確率で「突然動かなくなる」か「そのまま退出」します。観戦からの通報を避けるためのプログラムだと思われます。
時間がある方は一度DMの観戦モードをやってみてください。
初心者の方でもおかしいと感じる現象がすぐに起きます。
[/list]

DMに存在するBOTは、大きく分けて「異常な精度の即HS BOT」と「簡単に倒せるBOT」の2種類いますが、現在はBANリスクを避けるためか、後者の「弱めのBOT」が圧倒的に多いです。

[h2] 総評 [/h2]
DMは個人的に最も好きなモードで、普段からかなりプレイしています。だからこそ、この状況は本当に改善してほしいと思っています。

一応、コミュニティサーバーを利用すれば人間だけで遊ぶことも可能ですが、多くがロシアサーバーのためPingが非常に高く、日本からだと200近くになることもあります。


もちろんValveも何もしていないわけではなく、2026年には約96万アカウントを1日でBANしたとも発表されています。それでもBOTはすぐ補充され、DMは現在もBOTだらけです。

この問題だけで低評価を付けるのは少し理不尽かもしれませんが、DMをプレイしていて「PVPなのかPVEなのか分からない」と感じるレベルになっているのは、正直かなり厳しいです。

そのため、今回は低評価を付けました。

CS 2, rekabet hissini çok iyi veren ama teknik sorunlarıyla bazen keyfi kaçıran bir oyun. Yine de arkadaşlarla girince akıp gidiyor. Mantık değil, sinir testi.

J'ai 68 ans et cela fait 26 ans que je joue à CS et plus les années passent et plus ce jeu se dégrade. Non pas à cause de sa qualité, de ses graphiques et autres tous excellents, mais à cause des tricheurs qui ont la main totale sur le jeu, je pense que cela doit friser allégrement les 50 à 60% de tricheurs et la nouveauté qui m'agace sérieusement, le fameux Trust Factor. Sans tricher et sans être irrespectueux, à mon âge, la frustration n'existe plus et perdre ne me dérange pas, et bien je passe du rouge au vert sans arrêt . J'ai l'impression d'être une guirlande de Noel. Il est bien sur totalement inutile de demander au propriétaire de la plate forme de régler ce problème puisqu'il est soit incapable d'installer un vrai Anti Cheat, soit le business et plus important que les utilisateurs de ce jeu qui est à mon avis le meilleur de sa catégorie.
A valve, faite un effort, je voudrais bien pouvoir jouer en toute tranquillité avec mon fils et mes deux petits fils. De même faite un tour dans votre base de données pour voir qui y joue. D'ailleurs ne pourriez vous pas nous communiquer toutes les statistiques concernant l'âge, le pays, les bannis et le pays respectif.
O jogo em si é muito bom. Mas a comunidade estraga. Muito xiter e muito tóxico. Se teu objetivo é jogar para se divertir, esse não é o jogo ideal. Você entra feliz e sai depressivo.

🎮 Counter-Strike 2 hakkında uzun zamandır bu kadar bağımlılık yapan bir FPS deneyimi yaşamamıştım. Source 2 motorunun getirdiği görsel kalite gerçekten oyunun atmosferini tamamen değiştirmiş 🔥 Haritalardaki ışıklandırmalar, duman efektleri ve silah animasyonları inanılmaz derecede kaliteli olmuş. Özellikle smoke mekaniğinin artık gerçek zamanlı tepki vermesi oyuna ayrı bir strateji katıyor 💨🧠

🔫 Rekabetçi maçlar hala aşırı stresli ama bir o kadar da keyifli. Bazen takım arkadaşların sinir bozucu olabiliyor 😅 ama clutch anlarında yaşanan adrenalin hissi başka hiçbir oyunda yok. Headshot hissiyatı, aim mekanikleri ve movement sistemi yıllardır olduğu gibi yine mükemmel seviyede 🎯

🗺️ Mirage, Inferno ve Nuke gibi klasik haritalar Source 2 ile resmen yeniden doğmuş. Özellikle detaylar inanılmaz güzel görünüyor. FPS optimizasyonu bazı sistemlerde zaman zaman sorun çıkarabiliyor ama oyun geliştikçe daha stabil hale geliyor ⚙️

💎 Skin sistemi hâlâ piyasadaki en iyi kozmetik ekonomilerinden biri. Kasa açmak bazen büyük heyecan yaratıyor 😂 Bıçak düşürme hayaliyle açılan kasaların verdiği dopamine başka oyun yaklaşamaz sanırım 🔪✨

👥 Arkadaşlarla gece girilen Premier maçlarının verdiği keyif gerçekten tarif edilemez. Kazanınca dünyanın en iyi oyuncusu gibi hissediyorsun, kaybedince de monitöre bakıp hayatı sorguluyorsun 😄

⭐ Eğer rekabetçi FPS oyunlarını seviyorsanız Counter-Strike 2 kesinlikle deneyimlenmesi gereken bir yapım. Sinir bozucu anları olsa da verdiği tatmin hissi yıllardır değişmiyor. Valve bazı eksikleri düzeltmeye devam ettiği sürece oyun uzun yıllar zirvede kalır diye düşünüyorum 🚀

❤️ 9/10 – bağımlılık yapıcı, rekabetçi ve unutulmaz bir deneyim.

已经1750个小时了，才想起来居然没给CSGO写过测评，简单写一下吧，与其说是测评，其实更像是感触吧。比起其他fps游戏杂乱又繁琐的技能，CSGO提供了一个绝对公平的竞技模式，你能依靠的只有手中的枪和子弹。

喜欢CS或许是因为游戏胜利队友毫不吝啬的赞美，输掉比赛后队友的一声nice try，拿下关键人头时队友的那一句好枪，每一次残局时肾上腺素飙升控制不住的心跳，时长会因为失误而自责，即使1:11也没有人选择投降，大比分落后，努力追平比分，获得胜利，每一个人都在为追分而努力着。即便最后没有赢，公频上的 gg (good game) 至少证明大家的付出。

CSGO的魅力不仅仅是它充满竞技压力，更多时候是队友之间的互相鼓励，肌肉记忆，团队配合，道具练习，预瞄，经济，道具理解，假拆假脚步，残局，赢下不可能获胜的残局后的心跳与成就感。

虽然有时候会被打破防，觉得自己很菜，在拖队友后退，也时常遇到外挂和压力哥，觉得再也不想玩这个游戏，卸载了，但是下一次还是会打开对局的

CS2 é o ápice de todos os CS já lançados até hoje tanto em jogabilidade quanto em gráficos., ainda falta alguns mapas importantes como Cobblestone e Aztec, mas finalmente chegou a Cache em 2026 pra complementar.

Pra quem é raiz como eu e jogava CS 1.6 em LAN House e fazia corujão com a galera, CS nunca perde a graça.

Não é um jogo fácil, necessita aprendizado, treinamento de mira, saber usar os utilitários como Smoke, Flash e Molotov, noção de posicionamento e liderança caso vc não tenha alguém pra passar call no time, e serio, se não tiver alguém dando os comandos do que fazer principalmente de Terrorista o time fica igual barata tonta sem saber o que fazer dependendo absolutamente da habilidade pessoal de cada jogador, isso falando em modos competitivos e Especial pois tem outros modos que se pode jogar de forma mais casual não dependendo tanto do time.

CS é um jogo que mexe com nossa emoções, seja em torneios de E Sports onde fomos tão bem representados por nosso querido professor Gabriel Toledo (Fallen) quanto em nossas próprias partidas onde nosso nervos ficam a flor da pele com sustos e tensão constante, e sim, você vai tomar sustos nesse game kkk.

Infelizmente vem a parte que odeio nesse jogo.
 
Em 2020 depois de mais de 10 anos jogando CS GO eu resolvi dar um tempo, estava me afetando negativamente em minha vida, eu estava levando o game muito a serio, fora a quantidade exorbitante de trapaceiros usando diversos Cheaters tais como os piores:

Wallhack (WH): Permite ver através das paredes. O trapaceiro sabe exatamente onde o adversário está, podendo prever rotas ou dar pré-fires.

Aimbot: Ajusta automaticamente a mira para a cabeça ou corpo do inimigo. Pode ser total (trava instantaneamente no adversário) ou parcial (o famoso triggerbot, que atira sozinho apenas quando a mira passa pelo oponente).

Radar Hack: Mostra a localização de todos os jogadores no mapa através do radar externo, diminuindo a chance de ser pego por ferramentas de vídeo.

Spinbot / Anti-Aim: Trapaça visual e mecânica extrema. O jogador gira o personagem em alta velocidade e atira na cabeça dos inimigos simultaneamente, tornando-se impossível de acertar.

Scripts (No-Recoil e Bunny Hop): Automações que ajudam a controlar o coado da arma automaticamente (deixando os tiros retos) ou realizam pulos perfeitos em sequência.

Infelizmente isso desanima, ainda mais que a Valve é incompetente ou simplesmente não quer lidar de forma definitiva com esses trapaceiros banindo de uma forma que eles não consigam fazer uma nova conta, isso tudo me fez parar de jogar um dos games que mais gosto por anos.

No final de 2023 lançou CS2 e eu tentei jogar, mas ainda era desanimador, em 2025 voltei de forma continua a jogar esse jogo tão maravilhoso que amo tanto e posso dar uma dica aos iniciantes, a menos que tenha um sonho de ser profissional, não leve esse game tanto a serio, saiba que tem dias que vc vai jogar muito e dias que não vai jogar nada, saiba que pode cair contra trapaceiros e isso não tem o que fazer, só aceitar, mas quando um trapaceiro cair no seu time, vc tem a opção de kikar esse *** a qual pra ele deve ser bem frustrante, se vc tem um pingo de caráter, não aceito jogar com o **** desses!

Por fim, tenho orgulho de dizer que jogo CS a mais de 10 anos e nunca precisei de trapaças pois ainda tenho meus dedos e ainda tenho um cérebro que funciona até bem, obrigado pra quem chegou até aqui e tenha paciência com esse game maravilhoso que é tão injustiçado por uma comunidade trapaceira e toxica e pela Valve que é totalmente omissa e incompetente ao não tomar medidas contra essas pessoas do mal.

Counter-Strike 2 macht an sich wirklich extrem Spaß – gutes Gunplay, starke Atmosphäre und gerade mit Freunden oder im Competitive-Modus kann das Spiel richtig fesseln. Die Grafik und die neuen Effekte sind zwar gelungen, aber meiner Meinung nach setzt Valve aktuell die falschen Prioritäten.

Statt ständig neue Optik, Skins oder kleine Map-Änderungen zu bringen, sollte der Fokus endlich viel stärker auf Cheater und Hacker gelegt werden. Es ist frustrierend, wenn Matches durch offensichtliche Wallhacks oder Aimbots zerstört werden. Gerade im Ranked nimmt das oft den kompletten Spielspaß.

End of an Era. Requiem for a Legend

I grew up with this series. I personally loved CS 1.6, played it for over 14 years. That game was a masterpiece, endless mods, plugins, custom servers, a real community. That was Counter-Strike with a soul.
CS:GO was the last legend. CS 1.6, Source, GO, every entry was a step forward. CS2 is not a step forward. It's a rebrand. New engine? Sure. Better textures? Sure. That's it. Everything else is a downgrade.
ANTI-CHEAT: 3 YEARS OF SHAME.
Open Deathmatch and you see aimbots, triggerbots, wallhacks everywhere, farming accounts in plain sight. Report them and get silence back. You jump into Premier, run into a cheater, report him, match still counts, cheater keeps playing, Valve shook his hand and moved on. Yes, September 2025 had a big VAC update, lots of bans, cheat forums were crying. Nice. But by spring 2026 VAC Live is back in sleep mode, roughly 4,000 bans in March across tens of millions of players. That's a statistical error, not a fight against cheating. FACEIT became the norm not because people wanted it, but because Valve's own servers are unplayable.
SHOOTING: subtick that nobody asked for.
Aim at the head and the bullet goes nowhere. Shoot at a wall and get a headshot. The subtick system was supposed to make everything more precise. In reality visual feedback doesn't match what the server calculates, peeker's advantage is massive, and hit registration is still worse than it was in CS:GO. Pro players admit it, the community admits it, only Valve pretends everything is fine and drops a new skin collection.
CS2 = MARKETING. FULL STOP.
The new engine wasn't built to make the game better. It was built to make skins look prettier so they could sell for more. The skin market grew to $5.9 billion. AWP Dragon Lore sits at $70,000+. People hold pixels like stocks. They added character legs in a first person tactical shooter. Why? More body visible means more reason to sell clothing for your character. Agent skins already give real visual advantages on certain maps, cosmetics affecting gameplay. And in October 2025 Valve wiped $1.75 billion in skin market value in 24 hours with a single patch. People lost thousands of real money. That's the whole point, Valve runs the casino and changes the rules whenever they feel like it.
CS:GO was a legend. CS2 is its gravestone with better textures and a new case every two weeks. Play on FACEIT if you want a real match. Or go back to the memories of when Counter-Strike was a game, not a storefront.
Valve, you betrayed your own legend.

Итак, что же такое CS2?

CS2 — это когда скины стоят дороже крутых игровых девайсов.
CS2 — это когда ты обязан дропнуть свой красивый калаш всей команде.
CS2 — это когда открываешь 20 сундуков и получаешь 20 кусков синего говна.
CS2 — это когда тебя добавляют школьники и предлагают over 9000 сундуков в обмен на твой нож.
CS2 — это когда тебя добавляет школьник и начинает выпрашивать в подарок шмотку ценой в 5000 рублей, приводя при этом аргумент: «Да ты ж богатый, что тебе стоит!»
CS2 — это когда скамеры присылают тебе по 5 раз в день приглосы в друзья в надежде обчистить твой инвентарь.
CS2 — это когда тебе по 10 раз в день присылают ссылки на вирусы в надежде украсть твой аккаунт.
CS2 — это когда тебя выгоняют только потому, что ты русский.
CS2 — это когда «глобалы» создают по 10 аккаунтов и получают удовлетворение, играя против «калашей».
CS2 — это когда ты Russian Noob, если остался против пятерых, убил четверых, но не добил пятого.
CS2 — это когда ты Russian Noob при счёте 21–7–10, а у ближайшего тиммейта — 8–0–16.
CS2 — это когда ты выучил польский и шведский за одну‑две катки.
CS2 — это когда в соревновательном режиме поляков больше, чем в самой Польше.
CS2 — это когда ты в одиночку открываешь А, а бомба уже проёбана на Б.
CS2 — это когда на твои советы и вопросы тебе отвечают: «stfu Russian».
CS2 — это когда проебал три звания за день только из‑за того, что каждый раз играешь против «глобалов», играющих со второго аккаунта.
CS2 — это когда каждый третий тиммейт — забущенный сильвер.
CS2 — это когда против тебя играет пять долбаёбов с АВП. (За тебя тоже)
CS2 — это когда одного «беркута» и четырёх «калашей» кидает против пяти «супримов».
CS2 — это когда высаживаешь все 30 патронов в одного дебила и наносишь 99 in 7, а тот от страха рандомным выстрелом попадает тебе в голову.
CS2 — это когда VAC показательно банит профессиональных игроков, но не может забанить читера, который простреливает всю команду через три стены, имея при этом 2,2 часа в игре.

CSG2 es ese tipo de juego que te atrapa sin darte cuenta y, al mismo tiempo, te saca de quicio como cualquier otro juego. Es una mezcla perfecta entre habilidad, estrategia y caos.

Por un lado, es increíble: cada partida puede convertirse en algo épico, rondas donde juegas como si estuvieras en un torneo profesional, con reflejos perfectos, puntería precisa y decisiones inteligentes. Es en esos momentos donde entiendes por qué este juego sigue siendo tan adictivo. Un clutch 1 vs 3, una bala bien puesta o una jugada en equipo te hacen sentir imparable.

Pero luego está el otro lado… los jugadores. La comunidad puede ser muy tóxica: insultos, culpas, gente que se rinde rápido, gente que juega sin ganas o simplemente teamkill. Siendo sinceros, todos hemos sido parte de eso alguna vez. Porque, así como hay partidas donde te crees pro, también hay otras donde fallas todo, no conectas ni una bala y pareces nuevo.

Y ahí está la magia, la frustración de CSG2: es completamente impredecible. Un día eres el mejor del servidor y al siguiente no sabes ni qué estás haciendo. Pero eso es lo que hace que siempre quieras otra partida más… para demostrar que sí puedes.

Y ni qué decir de los ítems caros: nunca falta un millonario que está inspeccionando cada 5 segundos el arma, pero termina con 3 kills.

En resumen, Counter Strike no es solo un juego, es una montaña rusa de emociones. Te hace enojar, te hace reír, te hace mejorar, porque aunque lo odies a veces, siempre terminas amándolo.

我非常菜如果我购买了优先账户，其匹配排位会不会更加势均力敌，之前多次排位都是莫名奇妙的打高手被虐爆，我感觉就是匹配故意的，就像是一堆高手里硬塞一个新手，然后告诉我们我们是公平的
我非常理解你的感受，这绝对不是你的错觉，也不是你 "太菜" 的问题 ——非优先匹配池的匹配系统从根本上就是崩坏的，它就是会把纯新手强行塞给炸鱼的高手，让你体验极差。
而购买优先账户后，你的匹配体验会发生天翻地覆的变化，这也是优先账户对新手来说最有价值的地方，没有之一。
一、先告诉你真相：为什么非优先会把你虐到怀疑人生
这真的不是匹配系统 "故意针对你"，而是非优先匹配池已经变成了一个畸形的生态：
玩家基数极度萎缩且两极分化
现在几乎所有正常玩家（从新手到高手）都已经转移到了优先匹配池
非优先剩下的玩家只有两类：刚入坑的纯新手和开挂 / 炸鱼 / 练小号的高手
中间没有任何过渡的中端玩家，系统根本找不到和你水平差不多的人
为了凑人数只能强行匹配
非优先匹配一局经常需要等 10 分钟以上，系统为了尽快凑齐 10 个人
会毫不犹豫地把 1 个新手和 9 个炸鱼的放在同一局，美其名曰 "平衡"
这就是为什么你会感觉 "一堆高手里硬塞一个新手"，这就是非优先的常态
段位系统完全失效
非优先的段位没有任何参考价值，白银分段里全是 AK 水平的炸鱼党
你赢一局加的分很少，输一局掉的分很多，永远爬不出新手坑
二、优先账户的匹配到底好在哪里？
优先匹配池从根本上解决了上述所有问题，对于纯新手来说，体验提升是指数级的：
1. 真正的 "势均力敌" 匹配
优先匹配池有数百万活跃玩家，水平分布非常均匀，从纯新手到职业选手都有
系统可以轻松找到和你水平完全一致的 9 个玩家，不会再出现 "一边倒" 的屠杀局
你会遇到和你一样会马枪、会迷路、会犯低级错误的队友和对手，输赢都靠自己的发挥
2. 更科学的新手保护机制
新的优先账户会有严格的定级赛阶段（前 10-20 场）
系统会快速评估你的真实水平，然后把你精准地放到对应的分段
前几十场比赛的段位调整会非常快，如果你真的很菜，系统会立刻把你降到 "新手村"，而不是让你一直和高手打
3. 炸鱼成本大幅提高
炸鱼党需要花几十块钱买一个优先账户才能炸鱼，成本比非优先高得多
优先的段位系统更严格，新号会有段位锁定，连胜后会强制匹配高分段对手
Valve 现在对炸鱼的打击力度越来越大，频繁炸鱼的账号会被系统检测并提高匹配难度
4. 匹配体验更稳定
优先匹配速度更快，中低分段通常 1-3 分钟就能匹配到
队友和对手更认真，挂机、恶意 TK、喷子的数量大幅减少
不会再出现 "10 个人里有 5 个开挂" 的情况
三、客观说明：优先也不是完美的
我不会骗你说优先里完全没有炸鱼和不公平的比赛，但这些情况的概率比非优先低90% 以上：
偶尔还是会遇到炸鱼的，但通常是偶尔玩小号的高手，不会像非优先那样每局都有
偶尔还是会有一边倒的比赛，但这是任何竞技游戏都无法避免的
如果你真的非常菜，可能定级赛会定得比较低，但这绝对是好事 —— 你会和和你一样水平的人一起玩，游戏体验会好很多
四、给纯新手的特别建议
如果你购买了优先账户，按照以下方法做，你的游戏体验会更好：
定级赛不要怕输：前 10 场定级赛系统是在评估你的水平，输得越多，定的段位越低，你后续的游戏体验会越好
不要和比你水平高很多的人组队：如果和高分段的朋友一起玩，系统会把你们匹配到高分段的对手，你还是会被虐
接受自己是新手的事实：CS2 是一个非常难的游戏，新手被虐是正常的，即使在正确的分段，也需要时间来提升
利用优先账户的优势：多看自己的比赛录像复盘，这是提升技术最快的方法
总结
对于你这种情况，优先账户绝对是必买的。它不是什么 "氪金变强" 的道具，而是一张进入 "正常游戏环境" 的门票。
在非优先里，你再怎么努力也打不过炸鱼的，只会越来越挫败；而在优先里，你会遇到和你一样的新手，一起成长，一起享受游戏的乐趣。

I want Valve employees to play their own game and, when they encounter five cheaters on the enemy team, smile with pride because their game is so well made.

⭐ 0/10 — The Cheaters Have Better Matchmaking Than Players

Counter-Strike 2 feels less like a competitive shooter and more like a social experiment designed to test how much suffering a player can endure before uninstalling.

The anti-cheat situation is so bad that every match feels like a coin flip between playing Counter-Strike and starring in a live demonstration of "How Walls Work." Trust Factor? Nobody knows what it does anymore. Good players get punished, questionable players get rewarded, and everyone gets thrown into the same digital dumpster fire.

Then there are the servers. Nothing says "premier competitive experience" quite like dying three business days after reaching cover. Every gunfight feels like you're arguing with the server about what actually happened.

And let's talk about communication from Valve. The community reports problems for months, and the response often feels like a mysterious silence broken only by another case release. Bugs survive longer than most esports careers.

As for Gabe Newell, at this point I picture him as a giant greedy fox sitting on a mountain of case keys, occasionally peeking down at the player base and saying, "Have you considered opening another crate instead of fixing the game?"

CS2 somehow took one of the greatest competitive games ever made and turned it into a trust-factor lottery running on servers powered by wishful thinking.

Recommended? Only if your hobbies include packet loss, existential despair, and trying to determine whether your opponent has incredible game sense or just a second monitor showing the entire map.

Si pudiera devolver las horas perdidas intentando disfrutar esto, lo haría sin pensarlo. Lo que antes era un shooter competitivo sólido ahora parece una beta eterna. El rendimiento es pésimo: bajones de FPS, stuttering, input lag y servidores que parecen decidir las balas con una ruleta. El subtick prometía revolucionar el juego y terminó siendo una excusa elegante para justificar hits totalmente inconsistentes.

El matchmaking es un desastre, lleno de smurfs, cheaters y partidas completamente desequilibradas. Podés tener 15 kills más que todos y aun así sentir que el juego te arruina cada ronda. Encima sacaron contenido, modos y mapas que estaban hace años para reemplazarlos por… nada. Tremenda actualización para perder funciones.

La comunidad cada vez más tóxica, la economía del juego gira más alrededor de skins que de arreglar errores reales y Valve parece comunicarse menos que un NPC bugueado. Parece increíble que después de tantos años, un juego tan grande siga teniendo problemas básicos que otros shooters solucionaron hace tiempo.

Si buscás divertirte, hay opciones mucho mejores. Si buscás estresarte, renegar con el hitreg y preguntarte cómo te mataron detrás de una pared, entonces sí, este es tu juego.

After 2,556 hours, Counter-Strike 2 has become one of the most infuriating games I have ever played.

CS2 is still one of the best competitive multiplayer games on the market. The gunplay, maps, recoil control, utility usage, teamwork, and depth are all incredible. It is a game with decades of development behind it, and when it works properly, there are very few games that can match it.

But Premier is completely ruined by cheaters.

At 22k rating, the frequency of cheaters is insane. Whether they are on my team or the enemy team, it happens far too often. You spend the match doubting yourself, getting destroyed, wondering if you are just playing badly, only to rewatch the demo afterward and realize the player was cheating. That feeling completely kills the experience.

This review is being posted after being cheated against two games in a row. Out of around 200 Premier matches, I have personally found 23 games with cheaters after rewatching the demos. That is far too much.

The most frustrating part is that this is not just a few random users cheating. There is an entire market selling hacks for CS, and somehow, after all these years, Valve still has not found a reliable way to deal with it.

So, would I recommend this game?

No.

I do not think the amount of time required to learn the maps, recoil patterns, utility lineups, economy, timings, and teamplay is worth it when the experience is so often ruined by cheaters. CS2 can be an amazing competitive game, but in its current state, Premier makes it feel like your time and effort are not respected.

CS2 сохраняет всё лучшее из CS:GO — тактическую глубину и чувствительность оружия — и добавляет важные технические улучшения: Source 2, более точный сетевой код и реалистичные смоки. Игра стала честнее, отзывчивее и визуально приятнее, при этом остаётся требовательной к мастерству.
Однако есть минусы: к моменту релиза остаются баги и просадки производительности на некоторых конфигурациях, проблема с читерами всё ещё актуальна, а экономика скинов и сторонними ставками по‑прежнему раздражает людей, которые хотят чистого соревновательного опыта.
Плюсы
- Новый движок Source 2: лучше графика, свет и физика.
- Sub‑tick сетевой код: точнее регистрация попаданий.
- Переработанные карты и поведение дымов/гранат.
- Улучшенный звук — легче определять направления выстрелов
- Сохранённый соревновательный дух и высокий уровень мастерства.
Минусы
- Читерство и обходы античита остаются проблемой.
- Бывают баги и нестабильность на частях железа/драйверов.
- Экономика скинов и сторонние рынки/ставки — минус для некоторых.
- Некоторым игрокам придётся перепривыкать к мелким изменениям в физике и механике.
- не очень часто но есть долгие матчи из‑за разницы в уровне игроков в ранговом матчмейкинге

CS2, efsanevi CS:GO'nun yerini alan, Source 2 motoruyla güçlendirilmiş devasa bir görsel ve teknik güncelleme. Oyun artık çok daha aydınlık, haritalar baştan aşağı yenilenmiş durumda. Yeni motorun ışıklandırması sayesinde AUG | Kehribar Rüzgârı gibi ince detaylı silah kaplamaları oyun içinde çok daha göz alıcı duruyor.

Artıları:

Dinamik Sis Bombaları: Haritaya uyum sağlayan ve mermi/bomba ile geçici olarak dağılan, taktikleri baştan yazan sis fizikleri.

Sub-Tick Sistemi: Vuruş hissiyatını ve sunucu tepkilerini milisaniyelik hassasiyetle kaydeden yeni altyapı.

Hızlı Maçlar: 13 rauntluk (MR12) sistemle daha tempolu maçlar.

Gelişmiş Menü: Yanlış alınan silahı iade etme ve istenilen silahı (örneğin iki M4'ü aynı anda) kuşanma imkanı.

Eksileri:

Yüksek sistem gereksinimleri ve bazı bilgisayarlarda yaşanan optimizasyon/FPS sorunları.

Özellikle Seçkin (Premier) eşleştirmelerinde tam olarak çözülememiş hileci problemi.

CS:GO'da olan bazı sevilen oyun modlarının ve topluluk sunucularının eksikliği.

Sonuç: Eksiklerinin cilalanmaya ihtiyacı olsa da CS2, temellerini bozmadan çağa ayak uyduruyor. Saf bilek gücüne ve taktiğe dayalı rekabetçi FPS oyunları arasında hâlâ rakipsiz. (8/10)

Este jogo mostra um pouco da realidade nas cidades portuarias.
Os mapas frequentemente apresentam áreas industriais, armazéns, contêineres, guindastes e zonas de carga, elementos comuns em portos ao redor do mundo. Além disso, a presença de rotas estreitas, regiões de intenso fluxo de mercadorias e a mistura entre áreas comerciais e industriais pode transmitir uma sensação semelhante à dinâmica dessas cidades.

Outro ponto é que cidades portuárias historicamente funcionam como locais de encontro entre diferentes culturas, atividades econômicas e interesses diversos. Em uma interpretação ficcional, os conflitos mostrados no jogo poderiam simbolizar as tensões que surgem em regiões estratégicas para o comércio internacional. Dessa forma, mesmo sem retratar a realidade de forma precisa, o cenário acaba evocando aspectos visuais e sociais que muitas pessoas associam aos grandes portos.

Portanto, a semelhança não estaria nos acontecimentos do jogo, mas nos elementos arquitetônicos, logísticos e econômicos utilizados na construção dos mapas, que lembram ambientes encontrados em várias cidades portuárias do mundo.

Counter‑Strike 2 hat das Potenzial, ein großartiges kompetitives Spiel zu sein, doch in seiner aktuellen Form fühlt es sich für mich unfair und ausbeuterisch an. Die größte Schwäche ist das fehlende, effektive Anti‑Cheat‑System; hinzu kommt ein Monetarisierungsmodell, das eher nach Melken als nach fairem Angebot aussieht.

[h3]Unfaire Spielbedingungen durch Cheater[/h3]
In Matches begegnet man immer wieder Spielern, deren Verhalten stark nach Betrug aussieht: unmögliche Zielgenauigkeit, unnatürliche Bewegungsmuster, sofortiges Aufspüren von Gegnern. Solche Erfahrungen zerstören den Wettbewerbscharakter und den Spielspaß. Wenn das Entwicklerteam nicht konsequent und transparent gegen Cheater vorgeht, bleibt das Spiel für ehrliche Spieler frustrierend.

[h3]Fehlende glaubwürdige Anti‑Cheat‑Maßnahmen[/h3]
Es reicht nicht, gelegentlich Accounts zu sperren oder halbherzige Erklärungen zu liefern. Ein echtes Anti‑Cheat‑System muss proaktiv, technisch robust und regelmäßig aktualisiert sein. Solange die Wahrnehmung besteht, dass Cheater ungestraft bleiben, wirkt das Spiel wie ein Ort, an dem Fairness keine Priorität hat.

[h3]Monetarisierung wirkt ausbeuterisch[/h3]
Statt auf langfristige Spielerbindung setzt das Modell stark auf kurzfristige Einnahmen: teure kosmetische Items, ständige Angebote und Mechaniken, die Druck erzeugen, Geld auszugeben. Für viele Spieler entsteht der Eindruck, dass der Entwickler mehr daran interessiert ist, die Community zu melken, als ein ausgewogenes, faires Spielerlebnis zu bieten.

[h3]Persönliche Erfahrung und Auswirkungen[/h3]
Ich habe Matches abgebrochen, weil wiederholt das Gefühl aufkam, gegen unfaire Vorteile anzutreten. Das frustriert nicht nur, es demotiviert auch, Zeit und Geld in ein Spiel zu investieren, das seine eigene Integrität nicht schützt. Freundesgruppen, die früher regelmäßig spielten, sind seltener online — ein klares Zeichen, dass das Problem die Community spaltet.

Counter‑Strike 2 bietet technisch und spielerisch Ansätze, die begeistern könnten, doch ohne ein wirksames Anti‑Cheat‑System und mit einer aggressiven Monetarisierung bleibt es für mich eine Enttäuschung. Counter-Strike 2 – A Perfect 10/10
Counter-Strike 2 is nothing short of phenomenal. Valve has taken the legendary formula of Counter-Strike and elevated it to new heights, creating a game that feels both timeless and cutting-edge.

✨ Why CS2 Deserves 10/10
Visual Excellence: Powered by the Source 2 engine, maps are breathtakingly detailed, with realistic lighting, textures, and dynamic smoke effects that revolutionize tactical gameplay.

Flawless Gameplay: The mechanics are razor-sharp, responsive, and balanced. Every round feels fair, every duel thrilling, and every victory earned.

Innovation with Respect for Tradition: CS2 introduces modern features like sub-tick servers and reactive environments while preserving the competitive DNA that made Counter-Strike iconic.

Community & Esports Ready: Seamless transition from CS:GO ensures that millions of players and the global esports scene can thrive without interruption.

Immersive Atmosphere: From sound design to weapon handling, every detail contributes to an experience that is both intense and deeply satisfying.

🌍 Final Verdict
Counter-Strike 2 is not just a sequel—it’s the definitive version of the world’s greatest competitive shooter. It honors its legacy while boldly stepping into the future. For veterans and newcomers alike, CS2 is pure perfection.

Rating: 10/10 – A masterpiece of competitive gaming.

✔️ 300 Saatin Ardından: Bu Oyun Tam Bir Bağımlılık ve Sinir Harbi!

Oyuna sıfırdan, geçmişte hiç CS:GO falan oynamadan doğrudan CS2 ile girdim ve an itibarıyla 300 saati devirmiş bulunmaktayım. Dışarıdan bakınca "altı üstü bomba kurup çözüyorsun" denilen bu oyunun insanı nasıl içine çektiğini şimdi çok iyi anlıyorum.

Eğer benim gibi türe çok eski olmayan birinin gözünden bu oyunun ne olduğunu merak ediyorsanız, durum tam olarak şu:

✔️ Neden 300 Saattir Oynuyorum? (İyi Yanları)

* Vuruş Hissiyatı ve Mekanikler: Silahların geri tepmesini (spray) öğrenmek, o merminin tam kafaya gittiği andaki (headshot) ses ve tatmin hissi gerçekten muazzam. Başka hiçbir FPS oyununda bu vuruş hissiyatı yok.

* Grafikler ve Sis Mekaniği: Oyunun görselliği, ışıklandırmaları gayet modern ve temiz duruyor. Özellikle sis bombalarının (smoke) içine el bombası atıp geçici kör noktalar yaratma olayı taktiksel olarak oyuna çok büyük keyif katıyor.

* Premier Hırsı: Oyundaki en büyük motivasyon kaynağım kesinlikle Premier modundaki o puanı (CS Rating) yükseltme hırsı. O puanı bir tık daha yukarı taşımak, rütbe atlamak için her gün kendinizi paralıyorsunuz, tam bir bağımlılık döngüsü.

* Skin Dünyası: Pazarda saatlerce gezip bütçene göre en havalı skini seçmek, oyunda o silahı eline alıp incelemek (F tuşuna basıp durmak) ayrı bir zevk. Envanteri güzelleştirmek oyuna çok ayrı bir tat katıyor.

✔️ 300 Saatte Saçımı Başımı Yolduran Şeyler (Kötü Yanları)

* Hileci Sorunu: Maalesef oyunun en büyük kanseri bu. Seçkin (Prime) hesap almama rağmen, özellikle Premier modunda bazen öyle tipler geliyor ki oyun zevkinin içine ediyorlar. Valve'ın bu hile sistemini acilen çözmesi lazım.

* Mermi Kayıt Sorunları (Sub-tick): Bazen adamın tam üstüne sıktığıma, hatta kan çıktığına yemin edebilirim ama oyun "0 hasar verdin" diyebiliyor. Duvardan mermi yiyip ölme olayları da insanı çileden çıkarıyor.

* Toksik Kitle: Ruslar başta olmak üzere, mikrofondan sürekli bağıran, infoyu yanlış veren veya hiç oynamayıp oyunu sabote eden tipler moral bozabiliyor.

✔️ Sonuç:
CS2 tam bir "ne seninle, ne sensiz" oyunu. Söve söve kapatıyorsun, sinirlenip siliyorsun ama akşam olunca elin yine o "Oyna" butonuna gidiyor. O Premier puanını yükseltme hırsı ve envantere yeni skin ekleme isteği insanı bir şekilde ekrana bağlıyor. Rekabet hissini iliklerinize kadar yaşamak istiyorsanız kesinlikle şans verin, ama sinirlerinize de hakim olun.

✔️ Puanım: 7 / 10 ✔️

The game is fun except sometimes there are some cheaters.

Counter-Strike 2 is still one of the most fun and competitive FPS games ever made. The gunplay is great, the maps are iconic, and there really isn't another game that scratches the same itch. When you get a good match, it's easy to see why people have been playing Counter-Strike for over 20 years.

The biggest problem is the cheating situation. VAC feels like it only works when someone is blatantly rage hacking and making it obvious. Meanwhile, there are plenty of players, including Prime accounts, who try to hide their cheats and make them look legitimate. Anyone who has spent enough time in Premier or Competitive knows exactly what I'm talking about.

What's frustrating is that Valve is a billion-dollar company with more than enough resources to improve anti-cheat, yet it often feels like the issue isn't a priority. Legitimate players are left questioning whether someone is just having a good game or quietly using assistance that never gets detected.

CS2 is still a great game at its core, but it's sad to see it in its current state. The potential is there, the gameplay is there, but the cheating problem continues to hold it back.

I've spent 142 days of my life on this game. I'm at peace with that.

3,500 hours buys you specific things: throwing a smoke that lands on the pixel; hearing the first footstep and knowing  which agent skin they paid £15 for; recognising from the opening AK shot whether the player ahead of you has 50 hours or 5,000.

  A few things I now believe:

  - The best CS players aren't the fastest, they're the calmest. Anyone can flick. Almost nobody can hold an angle for
  45 seconds without flinching.
  - Every player has 60ms ping until they die, at which point they had 200ms.
  - "Drop me" is spoken in this game more than any voice line Valve has ever written.
  - A good teammate is the rarest cosmetic in the game.

  Counter-Strike is craft. Most of the time it doesn't love you back. Then it does, for one round, and that pays the
  bill for the next six months.

  Recommended. Obviously.

В школьные годы и после, в 2005-2008 годах в компьютерных клубах играли с друзьями в КС 1.6 С тех пор не играл ни в КС Го, ни во что-то другое. В 2025 году собрав себе игровой комп решил начать играть в КС2. Поначалу было интересно, я люблю рашит и благодаря этому от неожиданности противников делаю килы и оказываюсь в первой половине игроков по результатам. Но потом разочаровало обилия читеров в играх обычного режима, не понимаю зачем в обычном бесплатном режиме использовать читы? Из-за этого решил купить Прайм статус. После покупки, нужно добраться до 10-го уровня и сделать 100% чтобы открылось Премьер режим, каждую неделю нужно повышать ранги чтобы получить Дропы и ранги лучше повышать аккурат в среду, если раньше повысить это не засчитают для Дропа. Цена Прайм статуса даже с самыми дешевыми дропами окупиться за 2 месяца максимум. Но Прайм статус и игры в Премьер режиме не решают проблему читеров. Античит почти не работает, с повышением ранга попадаются всё больше читеров и софтеров которые со своими ботами фармят кейсы на нескольких аккаунтах, пока он играет за одного игрока его бот стоит АФК и эту проблему Валв не решают никак. В целом лучше не покупать Прайм статус а время от времени поигрывать в обычным режиме, чем купить и стараться окупить игру, играя постоянно с читерами не получая удоволствие

Counter-Strike used to feel like the king of competitive shooters, but now it often feels outdated and frustrating. Matches are filled with cheaters, toxic players, and inconsistent matchmaking that can ruin the experience even before the first round ends. The gameplay is still skill-based, but instead of being rewarding, it can feel repetitive and unforgiving for anyone who doesn’t grind constantly.

Despite updates from Valve Corporation, many long-standing problems remain unresolved. Server issues, questionable hit registration, and an overreliance on expensive skins make the game feel more focused on cosmetics than improving the actual player experience. Counter-Strike still has moments of brilliance, but it no longer feels fresh or welcoming compared to modern competitive games.

一款长盛不衰的高竞技性射击游戏，很公平，操作方便上手简单，想要精通却很难，内容深度不高但手部和脑部乘区高。可惜国区竞技环境太差，外挂太多太猖獗。官匹简单上手之后就建议转战平台了，虽然平台环境也不好，总比官匹休闲全是片姐和透视、脚本，竞技外挂约等于没有监管强点。游戏皮肤存在市场，可以自由交易，但最近因为各种更新水温跌宕起伏，信任几近崩塌，非要买建议就买买喜欢的在能力范围内的，做好亏的准备。有优先可以每周打打箱子什么的，有点微薄的收益。就游戏国区环境而言，如果不抱着非得赢的心去玩还是很不错的，和朋友一起组排体验会比单排好太多，是很值得深玩的游戏。但如果抱着强烈的胜负欲就会玩的很难受很憋屈，毕竟有无耻嘴硬却难以揭穿的作弊者破坏体验，而各种ELO机制又相当恶心人。可惜现在时间不多，没时间也没精力磨练自己的水准了。抛开市场和社区的乱象，谁不想和朋友好好娱乐一把，无所谓输赢。它简单，不代表它简陋，尽管诸多缺点，仍然无法掩盖它是一款好的、成功的游戏的事实。说真的，我在这里只能算是个新手，但我愿意推荐它。

CS2 Review Comment (English):
CS2 is a masterpiece held together by duct tape and prayers. The anti-cheat is a joke—cheaters run rampant while legit players get banned for existing. The hitboxes are so broken you'll swear your bullets teleported to another dimension, and the spray patterns? Completely different from what you practiced for years. Valve keeps tweaking stuff nobody asked for while ignoring the actual game-breaking bugs. It's competitive FPS roulette at this point. Still addictive though, which says more about us than the game. 10/10 emotional damage.

Comentário sobre CS2 em Português:
CS2 é uma obra-prima segura por fita adesiva e rezas. O anti-cheat é uma piada—hackers rodando solto enquanto jogadores legítimos levam ban do nada. As hitboxes são tão bugadas que você jura que suas balas teleportaram pra outra dimensão, e os padrões de spray? Completamente diferentes do que você treinou por anos. Valve fica mexendo em coisas que ninguém pediu enquanto ignora os bugs que quebram o jogo. É roleta russa de FPS competitivo nesse ponto. Mesmo assim é viciante, o que diz mais sobre a gente do que sobre o jogo. 10/10 dano emocional.

Counter-Strike 2, harika bir oyunun potansiyeline sahip ancak şu an için yarım kalmış bir devrim niteliğinde. Görsel geliştirmeler, yenilenen sesler ve dinamik sis mekanikleri oyun deneyimini yukarı taşımaya yetmiyor; çünkü hile sorunu oyunun tüm o taktiksel havasını ve eğlencesini zehirliyor. Valve acilen radikal ve agresif bir anti-hile güncellemesi getirmediği sürece, CS2 ne yazık ki hilecilerin birbirini vurduğu bir simülasyondan öteye geçemeyecek.

2026 yılında hala alternatifi olmayan bir oyun. Valorant olsun bf olsun cod olsun burdaki zevki vermiyor. İki önemli nokta var. Kesinlikle TR sunucusu açılması gerekiyor ve hile konusunda gerçekten etkili bir reform şart. Twitter'da açık açık hile reklamları görüyoruz. Maalesef hileden kaynaklı kitle de azalmakta. Hile konusuna güzel bir çözüm olması halinde eski kalabalık oyuncu sayısına çok rahat tekrardan ulaşır.

Counter-Strike 2 is still one of the best competitive FPS games out there. The gunplay feels sharp, the maps look cleaner than ever, and every round feels like it actually matters. It keeps the classic Counter-Strike formula that made the series legendary while giving it a fresh visual upgrade and smoother presentation. Whether you’re grinding Premier, playing with friends, practicing aim, or just trying to hit clean clips, CS2 has that addictive “one more game” feeling. It can be intense, frustrating, and sweaty at times, but that’s also what makes winning feel so rewarding. If you enjoy tactical shooters with real skill expression, teamwork, and clutch moments, CS2 is absolutely worth playing.

Counter-Strike 2 is a technically impressive evolution of CS:GO, featuring brilliant structural overhauls to classic maps and responsive shooting mechanics. 赛场喧嚣散去，Vitality众人没有急着离场庆祝。法国Apex带着队员，径直走向隔壁TYLOO的训练室。推开门，DANK1NG正和队友整理着装备，还未从刚刚的对决中完全抽离。没有胜负的傲慢，没有赛区的隔阂。Apex的目光径直落在DANK1NG身上，脚步停下，率先伸出了手，他的眼神里没有丝毫轻视，满是对他极致瞄准与绝对冷静的敬佩。身后的TOP1Zywoo与其他队员也跟着点头致意，认可这位来自东方的狙击手。DANK1NG起身，伸手与他们相握。没有多余寒暄，只有高手之间心照不宣的尊重。这是胜者对勇者的致敬，是顶尖赛场里最纯粹的惺惺相惜。一边是如日中天的世界顶级战队，一边是奋力亮剑的中国队伍；一边是运筹帷幄的传奇队长，一边是敢与神明较量的亚一狙。这一次赛后的主动握手，没有惊天动地的声势，却诠释了电竞最动人的内核——胜负之外，尊重永存；强者相逢，不问输赢。它没有赛场对决的热血沸腾，却在每一个热爱CS的人心里，留下了最温暖的印记。

Контр-Страйк 2 — это не просто игра, а настоящее испытание для нервов и выдержки. Каждый матч превращается в череду мучительных моментов, когда сердце замирает в ожидании исхода раунда. Здесь терзания и переживания становятся постоянными спутниками: ты то на грани победы, то на краю поражения.

Графика и атмосфера игры погружают в состояние душевного напряжения, когда каждый шаг может стать последним. Но именно эти испытания делают победу такой сладкой. Ты чувствуешь, как преодолеваешь внутренние муки, учишься справляться с неудачами и радоваться даже самым маленьким успехам.

Контр-Страйк 2 — это история о том, как через борьбу с собой и эмоциональные качели рождается настоящий азарт и командный дух. Эта игра не щадит, но именно поэтому она так цепляет и остаётся в памяти навсегда.

После скачивания этой игры ты перестаешь быть человеком и забываешь про то что у тебя когда то была личная жизнь, друзья и твое любимое дело. После того как ты зашел на сервер время назад ты уже вернуть не сможешь.
